CONNECT

Derek F. Amanatullah, M.D., Ph.D.

Surgeon · Researcher · Innovator · Leader

As an Associate Professor of Orthopaedic Surgery at Stanford University, I bring together engineering, science, surgery, and entrepreneurship to improve the lives of patients undergoing joint replacement surgery. My work spans unmasking hidden infections to building AI tools that make the operating room safer. I believe the best ideas start at the bedside, and I am driven by those ideas to make care get better for every patient.
